title: Neil deGrasse Tyson urges government to just ‘show the alien’ after latest UFO files release
description: Astrophysicist and science communicator Neil DeGrasse Tyson, 67, dropped a bombshell and told the government to “show the alien” while speaking on “The Fox News Rundown."

title: Pentagon Report Documents Giant Potato-Shaped UFO Over Colorado Springs
description: Five U.S. Army service members observed a giant translucent airborne potato-shaped UFO over the Cheyenne Mountains in 2022, according to a recently released report from the Pentagon. UFOs were a prevalent issue for Wyoming lawmakers last year.

title: Edge of the Unknown conference brings UFO experts to Bloomington
description: The Edge of the Unknown Conference will be held from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. Saturday, June 20 at The Chateau Hotel and Conference Center in Bloomington.

title: Italians Retrieve An Alien Craft During World War 2
description: AP Whistleblower David Grush, claims that the United States retrieved a crashed UFO craft from World War II Italian dictator Benito Mussolini, after getting a tip from Catholic Pope Pius XII.It has also been reported that the German and Italian [...]

title: ‘Disclosure Day’ review – UFO skeptic debunks Steven Spielberg’s alien movie
description: UFO skeptic Steven Greenstreet reviews Steven Spielberg’s alien movie “Disclosure Day,” revealing what he hated about it and debunking the entire Roswell UFO myth.
